# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability in jim.tennis, please report it responsibly.

**Do not open a public issue.** Instead, reach James Hartt directly via the **Parks Team Captains** WhatsApp group, or send a private message on GitHub to [@jameshartt](https://github.com/jameshartt).

Please include:
- A description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce it
- The potential impact

I'll acknowledge receipt within 48 hours and aim to provide a fix or mitigation plan within a week.

## Scope

This policy covers the jim.tennis application code in this repository. It does not cover third-party services or dependencies, though I appreciate being told if you spot a problem with those too.
